case_title: RANDY SWAYNE VS. DAVID F. HALL INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SWAYNE, RANDY

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWAYNE, RANDY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID F. HALL INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA D F H CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
